description: A satellite's telemetry shows it has unexpectedly entered safe mode. An operator must diagnose the cause and attempt to restore normal operations.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the safe mode alarm and retrieve the satellite's historical telemetry data leading up to the event.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls the relevant telemetry logs.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the data to find the root cause, such as a single event upset (SEU) in a memory chip.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the likely cause of the anomaly.

nodes.task_description: Follow the established procedure to send a command sequence to reboot the affected subsystem and return the satellite to its nominal operational mode.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the correct command sequence to recover the satellite.
